context: Evaluate whether the agent correctly applies the unknown-terminology fallback — adding inline parenthetical definitions for uncertain terms — while rewriting a cloud cost report for a finance director.

checklist.name: Unknown terminology fallback applied explicitly
checklist.description: Response acknowledges the unknown-terminology fallback and states it will add inline definitions for uncertain terms.

checklist.name: Inline parenthetical definitions added
checklist.description: Technical terms (EC2, Reserved Instance, NAT Gateway, RDS Aurora, PrivateLink, Compute Optimizer) each have an inline parenthetical definition on first use.

checklist.name: Uncertain definitions marked
checklist.description: Terms where the definition is a reasonable estimate are marked as '(estimated definition)' or equivalent hedging, not stated with false confidence.

checklist.name: Key message leads the rewrite
checklist.description: Rewritten report opens with the business summary (cost overrun amount, cause, and recommended decision) not a list of technical line items.

checklist.name: Action items have owners and deadlines
checklist.description: The three recommended actions are rewritten with named owners and deadlines using [Owner] must [action] by [deadline] format.
